scene_summary: A concrete gallery installation with a large scratched roller-print canvas on the left wall, frosted cipher-like glass panels on the right wall, a dark ink-covered rotating roller on a plinth, and several smaller pinned papers, labels, proofs, and specimen-like objects arranged along the floor and lower wall.
usable_surfaces: square dark paint proof on floor

detected_objects.label: Panoramic roller-print canvas
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large beige canvas mounted across the left wall with dark scratch marks, blue-gray smears, orange guide lines, and worn roller-print texture.

detected_objects.label: Frosted cipher glass wall
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall translucent glass panels on the right wall with repeated faint symbols, smudges, circular marks, and visible brass mounting points.

detected_objects.label: Paint-slick rotating roller
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large horizontal cylindrical roller covered in glossy dark blue-black paint, with metal axle handles and support brackets.

detected_objects.label: Ink-slick plate on roller plinth
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Rectangular concrete plinth beneath the roller with a glossy dark blue ink-coated top surface and visible paint pooling.

detected_objects.label: Pinned diagonal line study
detected_objects.visual_evidence: White pinned sheet leaning against the wall, marked with repeated diagonal black lines and small dot-like annotations.

detected_objects.label: Luhring Augustine placard
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Clean rectangular wall label reading 'Luhring Augustine' with exhibition text beneath it.

detected_objects.label: Vertical Japanese roller-as-plate card
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Narrow vertical paper card pinned to a support at the far right, showing Japanese text and the English phrase 'roller as plate' near the bottom.

detected_objects.label: Small square paint proof
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small floor-mounted square or rectangular proof with a dark blue painted center and rough pale border.
